meta.note: Mid-run snapshot derived from the live fastchess perturbation midpoints at iter ~183 of 300. An earlier git stash / git pull / git stash pop cycle orphaned the driver's history.csv file descriptor, so history.csv on disk reflects iters 0-104 only. The driver is still appending rows to the unlinked inode; the final theta.json written at run end will overwrite this snapshot with the full-run values.
